mentions.note: Monster quarter last time; bet numbers still aren't high enough, so estimates can go higher; upside surprises likely to continue despite emerging competition.
Da Vinci surgical robot had great quarter but facing competitive threats from J&J and Medtronic; worry one competitor will land disruptive offering and cannibalize market dominance.
Surgical robotics leader hit new lows despite quality business; market indifference to non-data-center healthcare.
Too much competition; used to be sole king but now there are three or four kings in surgical robotics space. Problem is too many competitors.
